table_1_fuel_column_headers: Solid fossil fuels, peat, peat products, oil shale and oil sands

space_heating: Final consumption - other sectors - households - energy use - space heating
space_cooling: Final consumption - other sectors - households - energy use - space cooling
water_heating: Final consumption - other sectors - households - energy use - water heating
cooking: Final consumption - other sectors - households - energy use - cooking
lighting_appliances: Final consumption - other sectors - households - energy use - lighting and electrical appliances
other_end_use: Final consumption - other sectors - households - energy use - other end use

parse_notes: Table 3 sheet name in residential_cams_downscale.config.json (e.g. Table 3_2023).
Synonyms match row labels: long Eurostat strings first, then short tails.
table_1_fuel_column_headers documents Table 1 columns for future fuel-mix weighting (not yet applied in M).
R_BOILER_* uses mean(space_heating, water_heating) when both parsed.
